title: jest.config.js uses deprecated ts-jest globals config
evidence: jest.config.js:8-11 — globals.ts-jest is deprecated in ts-jest v29+; use transform config instead

title: LIKE filter uses wildcard-wrapped user input without escaping LIKE metacharacters
evidence: src/app.ts:41 — `.all(`%${author}%`)` passes user input directly into LIKE pattern; while parameterized (safe from SQL injection), characters like % and _ in author names are treated as wildcards
suggestion: Escape LIKE metacharacters in the author value before wrapping with %
